descriptions.text:
Over 100 rooms of your favorite trick Shell jumps! whooohoooo oh yea baby gimme that sweet kaizo gas pack we bringing all the smoke with this one and I promise YOU WILL feel it!

Thank you to everyone that play my hacks and motivate me to build fun setups. This Is my 17th Rom hack yea right wtf it does not seem real. Ok time for shell jumps!! GLHF
